settings.title: Microcurrent lift
settings.text: Gentle current works the facial muscles for a visibly lifted look.

settings.title: EMS sculpting
settings.text: Targets the jaw, neck and double chin for a defined V-shape.

settings.title: 7-colour LED
settings.text: Red light to support firmer, glowier-looking skin.

settings.title: De-puff & glow
settings.text: Boost circulation and drain puffiness in just 5 minutes.

settings.title: Prep
settings.text: Smooth a layer of conductive gel over clean skin.

settings.title: Glide
settings.text: Move Lúma slowly upward and outward along your jaw, cheeks and neck.

settings.title: Glow
settings.text: 5 minutes, 5x a week. Lift now, lasting results in 4–6 weeks.

settings.quote: My jawline after two weeks?? I cancelled my facial appointment. The lift is real.
settings.name: Naledi M.

settings.quote: I use it before nights out — instant de-puff and my cheekbones actually pop. Worth every cent vs the R3k brands.
settings.name: Chloé V.

settings.quote: Sceptical at first but the under-eye puffiness in the mornings is gone. 5 minutes while my coffee brews.
settings.name: Ayesha K.

settings.heading: Lift it, or your money back.
settings.text: Try Lúma for 30 days. If you're not seeing the lift, we'll refund you in full — even if you've used it.

settings.question: Does it hurt?
settings.answer: Not at all — most people feel a gentle tingle or nothing. Start on the lowest level and build up.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: An instant lift after session one; firmer, more sculpted results build over 4–6 weeks of regular use.

settings.question: What do the 7 LED colours do?
settings.answer: Each colour targets something different — red light is the hero for firmer, glowier-looking skin, while blue helps with blemishes.

settings.question: Do I need a special gel?
settings.answer: Yes — microcurrent needs a water-based conductive gel. Add ours at checkout, or use any aloe gel.

settings.question: Who shouldn't use it?
settings.answer: Avoid if you're pregnant, have epilepsy, a pacemaker or other electrical implant. Check with your doctor if unsure.

settings.question: How long is delivery?
settings.answer: Ships with tracking; free across South Africa, in about 1–2 weeks.

settings.question: What if it's not for me?
settings.answer: You're covered by our 30-day money-back guarantee. Not lifted? Message us for a full refund.
